narrative:
20 Ohio Senate district has 249,049 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.4% D−R vs -21.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
